meta.title: Binbang – Beta Guide
meta.description: Binbang is currently in beta. Instead of public pricing, see the current scope, how to join, and where to send feedback.
meta.ogDescription: Binbang beta guide. See the current scope and how to join.

hero.heading: We're refining the beta before we put pricing in front
hero.subline1: Binbang is currently running as a small beta.
hero.subline2: We're stabilizing the real workflow and alert quality before public billing.
hero.description: You can sign up and start the core monitoring flow right away. If you need more coverage, we expand it gradually based on feedback and operational readiness.

beta.title: Open beta first
beta.description: Instead of a price table, we explain the current scope and usage rules first.

coverage.title: What is available now
coverage.description: We're validating vacancy alerts, base usage limits, and the core monitoring flow before anything else.

feedback.title: Feedback before packaging
feedback.description: If you need more capacity or a missing feature, the team reviews it in the context of real usage.

step1.title: Sign up and start
step1.description: Create an account, register the stay you want, and use the service immediately within the current beta scope.

step2.title: Usage first
step2.description: We show registration limits and check cadence before we talk about formal billing.

step3.title: Ask when you need more
step3.description: If you need broader monitoring, contact the team and we'll review it based on beta operations.

cta.title: Try the beta first and tell us what breaks
cta.description: Right now the priority is making the real product loop stable, not promoting plans. You can start right away or contact the team directly.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Do I need to pay right now?
faq.a1: No. Public pricing and automatic billing are not active yet. The service is currently managed around beta access and usage scope.
faq.q2: Can I use the beta immediately?
faq.a2: Yes. You can sign up and start within the current scope right away, though some limits may change as we stabilize operations.
faq.q3: What if I need more monitoring capacity?
faq.a3: Use the contact button on this page or email support. We review expansion requests based on actual use cases.
